case_title: DERE, WESLEY VS WALP, PAUL BERNARD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $294.25 FILED BY DERE, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT WALP, PAUL BERNARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1996 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
